pages.raw_text:
Trouble is brewing In the ma
chine shop of the Great Northern
at Hillyard. A number of old men
were displaced when the shop re-
opened yesterday by men imported
from the east. There had been no
trouble in the shops, but the rail-
road management, it is charged,
sought to vent its spleen on union
men in general by firing a lot of
the old mach .nists.


This thing has occurred a mum.
Der of times before in the Hillyard
shops, but the men let it pass I'M
noticed. Not so on this occasion,
however.


A meeting of the machinists' UNI
on has been called for Friday night,
when some acton in support of the
discharged Hillyard shopmen will
likely be taken. The men put in
the place of those let out are card
men, but this is no excuse in the
eyes of the union.
